name: openclaw-team-ops-console
description: OpenClaw Team Ops Console - Read-only governance and visibility for OpenClaw runtimes

scripts.dev: corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/shared build && concurrently -k -n SIDECAR,API,WEB -c cyan,green,magenta "corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/sidecar dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/overlay-api dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/overlay-web dev"
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/shared build && corepack pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @openclaw-team-ops/shared build && node --import tsx --test test/**/*.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/prepare-playwright-linux-libs.mjs && node scripts/build-e2e-web.mjs && node --import tsx --test test/**/*.e2e.ts
scripts.check: corepack pnpm guard:readonly && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm test:e2e
